rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies a load-bearing inconsistency in the original text and proposes a minimal repair, walking the chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims and provides recommendations with confidence marks and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., internal contradiction).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
